summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Upload and Categories CRUD features. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing confirmed Categories tab, add/edit/delete category dialogs, and ImageUploader component in product form all working correctly.

console_warnings.impact: Accessibility warning only, no functional impact

console_warnings.warning: Recharts width/height warnings on dashboard charts
console_warnings.impact: Charts may not render correctly on initial load

passed_tests: Backend: Admin login with identifier field works
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/categories fails for category with products
Backend: POST /api/upload works for admin (returns URL)
Backend: /uploads/ path is configured and accessible
Frontend: Categories tab accessible with grid display
Frontend: Add category dialog opens and works
Frontend: Category form auto-generates slug from name
Frontend: ImageUploader component present in product dialog
Frontend: Add URL image button (data-testid='add-url-image-btn') present
Frontend: Uploaded files served from /uploads/ path
critical_code_review_comments: DialogContent components missing aria-describedby for accessibility - minor issue
Recharts ResponsiveContainer may need explicit minWidth/minHeight for initial render
seed_data_creation: Test categories created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Upload and Categories CRUD fully tested and working. Single upload (POST /api/upload) and multiple upload (POST /api/upload/multiple) both require admin auth and return URLs in format /uploads/{filename}. Categories CRUD at /api/admin/categories requires admin auth. Public GET /api/categories returns all categories. ImageUploader component in AdminPage.js uploads to /api/upload and adds URLs to product images array. Files are served from /app/backend/uploads/ directory via FastAPI StaticFiles mount.

categories_crud.delete: DELETE /api/admin/categories/{id} (admin, fails if products use category)
